Business: K.C.P. Sugar and Industries Corporation Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells sugar and related products in India. The company offers bio-fertilizers, rectified spirit, extra-neutral alcohol, ethanol, surgical sprit, organic manure, anhydrous alcohol, mycorrhiza vam, calcium lactate, and carbon dioxide.
